description: Search for issues in Jira using JQL (Jira Query Language).

inputs.name: jql
inputs.description: JQL query string (e.g. 'project = ENG AND status = "In Progress"')

inputs.name: max_results
inputs.description: Maximum number of issues to return

inputs.name: start_at
inputs.description: Index to start at for pagination

outputs.name: count
outputs.description: Number of issues returned in this page
